examples: this car consumes a lot of gas
They run through 20 bottles of wine a week
the plague wiped out an entire population

meanings.definition: eliminate completely and without a trace
examples: The old values have been wiped out
The Turks erased the Armenians in 1915

meanings.definition: mark for deletion, rub off, or erase
examples: kill these lines in the President's speech

meanings.definition: wipe out the effect of something
examples: The new tax effectively cancels out my raise
The `A' will cancel out the `C' on your record
